# Patterns that must never appear in this public repo (case-insensitive,
# word-boundary regex, one per line). This repo is distilled from a private
# client-facing codebase - CI greps every PR against this list.
#
# Intentional public pointers (sdet.it, brain.sdet.it in README) are NOT
# listed here - only names that identify clients or private internals.
# Extend it whenever a new private-to-public port introduces a new client,
# internal hostname, or product codename that has to stay private.
crehler
forgefront
forge-core
coffeedesk
exparto
libra
